entry.title: Fastgithub auto start
entry.content:
Fastgihub auto start

Sometimes, we could not access to github.com, and watt-toolkit is a very great tool, which is also named as steam++. However the software will make some trouble to git push to the github with ssh key. If you do not have other network accelerate demand, fastgithub is a good choice.

Install

If you are able to access to github.com, you may install in here.
Vice versa, you could follow gitee(it wasn’t an official website), or search on the browser by yourself better.

Auto start

  1. right click on the “this computer” and click on the manager.![[mmc_NUMzLOFEXb.png]]
  2. right click on the “tasks schedule library” in the “task schedule programme” in the “system tools”, then click “create tasks”![[mmc_hc8evz3XKX.png]]
  3. name “fastgithub” or any other name as you like.![[mmc_WToyVFymYB.png]]
  4. turn into the “trigger”, click on the “create”, then set as the picture.
  5. then turn into the “control”, click on the “create”, then choose the path where you install the fastgithub.exe
    ![[mmc_ah7gDUFY7m.png]]
  6. in the “condition”, set the same as the picture.![[mmc_jtAlRQy98K.png]]
  7. in the “setting”, set the same as the picture.![[mmc_upPBLMuqe0.png]]
  8. finally click the “ensure” one by one. When the system ask for password, input the password of you computer, instead of pin.

entry.title: A Official Manual of Hexo
entry.content:
Welcome to Hexo! This is your very first post. Check documentation for more info. If you get any problems when using Hexo, you can find the answer in troubleshooting or you can ask me on GitHub.

Quick Start

Create a new post

More info: Writing

Run server

The operation will deploy hexo to the local host, you can see in [here]{http://localhost:4000}

More info: Server

Generate static files

More info: Generating

Deploy to remote sites

It will deploy blog to a website.
More info: Deployment

entry.title: set a cool figure in your terminal

in the Debian

  1. install
  2. config
  3. add neofetch at the end.

in the windows

  1. install scoop

  2. set the scoop bin path(usually C:\Users\YourUserName\scoop\apps\scoop\current\bin) to the environment path

  3. install neofetch

  4. config

entry.title: how to shortcuts of windows termianl
entry.content:
install and set hotkeys

  1. turn on a windows termianl
  2. open tasks manager
  3. click on the terminal to unfold the programme
  4. right click on programme with the correct picture, open the path of the file
  5. find “wt.exe” and create a shortcuts of it
  6. right click on the shorcuts, open the attributes.
  7. set hotkey and click yes

better work with autohotkey

when we press hotkeys, no matter whether there is a running termianl, system always open a new terminal. To solve this, we can use autohokey

  1. install
  2. create a script and name as terminal_open.ahk
  3. change the content
  4. set the script start with system, the same as before.
  5. if it didn’t work, it probably because of the ahk_class was different. We could use a script named window spy to find the correct ahk_class

entry.content: start <the path of file>

scroll

half scroll

  • up: ‘ctrl’ + ‘u’
  • down: ‘ctrl’ + ‘d’

jump to the end

‘G’

change shell to zsh

if you meet some ceritifice problem

change theme

entry.title: how to personalize the shortcut of the software
entry.content:
we can use the plugins of the xournal++^[https://blog.csdn.net/qq_41776453/article/details/128764167].

  1. enter the path /Xournal++/share/xournalpp/plugins/Example.

  2. if you like change the plugin.lua

  3. change the main.lua

  4. attention you can not use number as shorcut because xournal has setted.

  5. if you want add other function, you may change the language to english and then you could know what the tool’s name in english

Recover

  2. change user su <user>

entry.title: What is Docker
entry.content:
Container

Before we learning the docker, we have to know what is docker. In the development of applications, we need to transmit our appliciton between different collegue and different computer. However, in the different computer the environment is different, the application may go well on your computer, and go wrong on your collegues’. In order to solve the problem, someone choose to copy the whole operating system, but it will consume much more resource. So container arised at the historic moment, it packs up the application and its bin or lib together in the container, so that you are able to run application on different computer.

Docker

So docker is accutually a project writed with GO programming language to achieve container technique. It just like a function in your mobile phone to create mirror of application in your phone.

entry.title: how to sync different folder in git
entry.content:
我利用hexo博客搭建了自己的个人博客，但是使用vscode总是感觉无法很好的管理整理自己的博客，这时候我想到了obsidian，我希望利用obsidian作为我的博客管理软件。但是我的博客obsidian已经利用git同步了。这时有两个办法

  • 在obsidian的博客下建立一个hexoblog
  • 在wsl下安装obsidian
  • 利用git对两个文件夹进行同步。
    这里先介绍第三个版本
    可以让两个不同Git仓库中的一个文件夹保持同步。

一种常见的方法是使用 git subtree 或 git submodule 。不过 git subtree 相对来说更容易上手用于这种场景。

例如，假设你有仓库A和仓库B，想要同步仓库A中的 folder1 到仓库B中。

1. 在仓库B中添加仓库A作为一个远程仓库：

  •  git remote add repoA <仓库A的远程路径> 
    2. 用 git subtree 拉取仓库A中的 folder1 ：
  •  git subtree add –prefix=<仓库B中的目标路径> repoA <分支名> –squash ，这里的 –squash 参数是把从远程仓库拉取的提交合并成一个，减少历史记录的混乱。

之后如果仓库A中的 folder1 有更新，在仓库B中同步更新可以使用：
 git subtree pull –prefix=<仓库B中的目标路径> repoA <分支名> –squash 。

另外，如果不想使用 git subtree 这种方式，也可以编写脚本，通过 git checkout 和 cp （复制文件）命令组合来手动实现从一个仓库的文件夹复制到另一个仓库的对应文件夹，但这种方式比较麻烦，并且容易出错。

1. don’t not use git add . and commit.

entry.title: the vim tutorial
entry.content:
移动光标

hjkl

工作流程

  1. vim打开文件然后
  2. 然后i 进入编辑模式
  3. 编辑完成后：wq退出

常见功能一共有：

  • 移动光标
  • 编译文本
  • 特殊命令

entry.title: wsl移动系统镜像之后，还原系统之后重新挂载wsl
entry.content:
for some reason I move my wsl_debian to D disk, however I met some problem when reset my network and have to revert my system. And although my wsl_debian keep still, but system could not find it anymore.

  1. install and update wsl, then install a linux the same as your original linux.

  2. press + , and input regedit.

  3. find HKEY_CURRENT_USER\SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Lxss

  4. find BasePath, and change it to your original wsl_path.

entry.title: A highly effective software capslock+ in the windows
entry.content:
忽然发现存在一个极其高效的软件，结合输入法可以实现中英文混合输入编辑代码。但是快捷键工作量有一点大，特此记录过程。
可能需要自己重写一次代码了，这个代码太混乱了。

  • 首先为了便于传播应当借助vim的使用手册编辑。模仿给出快捷键。
    首先你应该写一个vim手册完全了解vim

  • 问题如何在写代码时把中文符号转化为英文符号。同时不影响中文输入。

    • 似乎不太现实
    • 或者设置快捷键方便于快速切换中英文
    • 或者设置快捷键切换方便切换中英文的标点符号。
    • 或者自动转换识别中英文符号

  • 如何进入vim的选中模式。

  • 然后要考虑把功能分类。

  • 有一个问题我的win按键无法使用。

  • 首先我的按键习惯是CapsLock和Ctrl互换使用，因此要考虑是返回按键之后如何用CapsLock代替Ctrl。

  • 还有如何集成listary到CapsLock+ 中

  • 如何代替左右箭头按键，不不不左右箭头按键已经可以被替代了，无敌了这下。

  • 能不能实现快捷键绑定功能呢？这样我就可以实现Ctrl enter功能了

  • 还有如何实现输入法删除功能，避免双手的移动。实现了caps + w

和vim的差异

vimCaps+
单一删除xi

快捷键的思路

  • 不需要使用快捷键储存，可以利用vim或者直接Ctrl

意料之外解决的问题

  • 新的移动快捷键不需要重复退出移动光标了，便捷了中文编辑

习惯调整

注意事项

更换的快捷键会保留原来功能如果不自己绑定其他功能。

待解决问题

  • 把qbar切换为listary：目前的问题在于发送快捷键。
  • 如何尽量代替ctrl，ctrl挺好press
  • 把短按Caps作为切换输入法
  • 如何切换大小写
  • 删除操作很难受，最好放在左右手
  • cap+q的快捷键浪费了
  • 拖动窗口
  • 中文打出英文符号

预计增加功能

  • 数字小键盘

待学习网站

0

配置开机自启动流程

  1. 转化可执行文件（放置在默认的地址，也就是ahk文件的位置）
  2. 利用计划启动管理器
  3. 设置注意事项
    • 把启动时间设置为登陆之后（太早启动会导致出错）
    • 在常规选项中选择以最高权限运行
    • 同时在配置中切换为Windows10
    • 在操作选项中的起始于地址设置为可执行文件的位置（否则不会加载自定义的内容）

entry.title: how to backup your source code in the hexo
entry.content:
由于hexo上传的总是编译后的静态文件，如果源文件丢失了就很尴尬了。所以备份源文件还是必要的。由于hexo-deploy插件不会创建.git文件，所以我们可以利用git进行备份。

之后如果想进行备份直接

entry.title: install texlive in the wsl
entry.content:
texlive will run faster in the linux than in the windows, so I decide to install texlive in the wsl.

Preparation

  • vscode in the windows
  • already install vscode-server in the wsl

download

install the iso in the mirror website here

remember put into the windows’s file system, rather than linux file system.

mount the iso

it will output some thing wrong, it doesn’t matter

install

install configure

something in the tex live is less use, so we can cancel these installation.
press ‘c’ to personalize.
here is what I cancel:

when you need it you are able to install them with tlmgr

then press ‘r’ and ‘enter’, go back to the main menu.

finally press ‘i’ and ‘enter’, wait for the installation completed.

After installation

update the path. edit ~/.zshrc, add:

save and exit.

Finally:

use vscode

install the LaTex Workshop and Remote Development

entry.title: tuple.md
entry.content:
tuple

it is unchangable.

a = (1) is not a tuple , a = 1
a = (1,) is a tuple

entry.title: list
entry.content:
list in the python

  • list(): break into list temporaliy.

  • index(): return the first position of a figure in a breakable varibles.

  • count(): count the appear times of the figures.

  • append(): add a terms at the end

  • extend(): add the terms in the new list to the list

  • pop(): remove the specific position terms, and return the removed term.

  • remove(): remove the specific term in the list

  • reverse(): as the name say

  • sort(list, key = len, reverse= True): change the sort of list

  • sorted(): the same as sort, but it doesn’t change the sort of the list and return sorted list

For loop in python

entry.title: Have To Execute Hexo With Sudo
entry.content:
Have to execute hexo with sudo

Reason

sudo chown -R azureuser:azureuser /path/to/hexo/folder
chmod -R u+rwX /path/to/hexo/folder

- change the /path/to/hexo/folder to that init executed. - remember do not ```sudo hexo init``` again.
